◎简　　介  

　　Set in a glittering Nevada casino town, two old world vampires take on a new life among the tourists and degenerates. As the bodies pile up, suspicions of the local authorities draw in on them forcing a confrontation of family loyalty and a clash of new eras versus old.”How long could a vampire stick to hematophagy in a modern world before getting caught?
